top_signals.title: Japan’s ‘decisive action’ threat does little to scare yen bears
top_signals.summary: The lack of movement in the yen following the warning speaks to the diminishing power of verbal intervention if it isn't backed up with further action.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Sheinbaum, Carney to Watch World Cup Final With Trump
top_signals.summary: Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum and Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney will travel to the US to attend Sunday’s World Cup final on President Donald Trump’s invitation, creating the opportunity for a reset after a month filled with regional tensions.
